alert_summary: Shared infrastructure service failure is cascading to dependent workloads.

alert_timeline.message: Service health check failing — no response from endpoint

candidate_ranking.reason: Common upstream dependency for shared services topology nodes
Peripheral node — no direct evidence of involvement
Peripheral node — no direct evidence of involvement
On the propagation path between SYSLOG-01 and AD-01

reasoning_steps: 1. First symptom observed at SYSLOG-01 — server reports connectivity degradation.
2. Alert propagation traced upstream: AD-01 → IAM-01 → MON-01 → SYSLOG-01.
3. AD-01 has highest topological reach — zero or minimal in-degree, maximum out-degree.
4. All impacted nodes (IAM-01, MON-01, SYSLOG-01) are downstream-reachable from AD-01.
5. Candidate ranking confirms AD-01 as primary root cause (score: 0.85).
recommended_actions: Verify DNS server availability and zone file consistency
Check IAM / identity service health and TLS certificate validity
Validate NTP server reachability and stratum level
Review monitoring system logs for cascading service failures
